title: oreogrammitis rupestris
intro: Oreogrammitis rupestris, also known as the rocky fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis rupestris include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
